note: Pre-refactor parity baseline for U0 (renderer registry). Captured from the schema-1.2 inline rhythm-strip implementation before the registry refactor. The registry path MUST reproduce these byte-for-byte (SVG sha256) and reason-for-reason (validation strings), except for intentional placement-policy widenings recorded in PROJECT-HISTORY.md. Do not regenerate casually: a diff here means behavior changed.

validationReasons.name: rate9999
reasons: questions[0]: visual.rateBpm must be between 20 and 300

validationReasons.name: duration99
reasons: questions[0]: visual.durationSec must be between 3 and 12

validationReasons.name: conduction0
reasons: questions[0]: visual.conductionRatio must be between 1 and 8

validationReasons.name: notObject
reasons: questions[0]: visual must be an object

validationReasons.name: badPlacement
reasons: questions[0]: visual of kind rhythm_strip is not allowed on fill_in_blank

validationReasons.name: badCaption
reasons: questions[0]: visual.caption.en is required when caption is present

validationReasons.name: badCaptionZh
reasons: questions[0]: visual.caption.zh must be non-empty when present

validationReasons.name: allRanges
reasons: questions[0]: visual.rateBpm must be between 20 and 300; visual.durationSec must be between 3 and 12; visual.seed must be between 0 and 9007199254740991; visual.atrialRateBpm must be between 20 and 400; visual.conductionRatio must be between 1 and 8; visual.prSec must be between 0.06 and 0.4; visual.qrsSec must be between 0.04 and 0.24; visual.qtSec must be between 0.16 and 0.7; visual.calibrationPulse must be a boolean
